sanskrit:
बुद्धेर्भेदं धृतेश्चैव गुणतस्त्रिविधं शृणु।
प्रोच्यमानमशेषेण पृथक्त्वेन धनञ्जय॥
transliteration: buddher bhedaṃ dhṛteś caiva guṇatas tri-vidhaṃ śṛṇu / procyamānam aśeṣeṇa pṛthaktvena dhanañjaya //
literal_meaning: Of-intelligence the divisions / and of-steadiness also / by-the-modes threefold / hear / as-it-is-being-described / completely / separately / O-winner-of-wealth
contextual_meaning: Krishna signals a shift from outer action to inner architecture: how the mind slices reality and how willpower holds steady are themselves filtered through three innate operating systems—sattva, rajas, tamas.  The invitation is to map one’s own cognitive firmware before judging choices.
psychological_state: Pre-contemplative scanning—Arjuna’s mind is open but braced for the possibility that his prized clarity may be guna-bound rather than absolute.
trigger_scenario: You’re about to receive personalized feedback from a 360-review at work and worry the report will show your ‘objective’ decisions are just your temperament talking.
anchor_text: Notice how your mind sorts reality before you decide what is right.
